prompt: Hero frame, vertical 9:16 mobile ad still: an authentic Helix Jump in-game moment rendered in 3D minimalist style with bright contrasting colors and simple geometric shapes, showing the iconic vertical helix tower of stacked circular platforms sliced open as a clean cross-section revealing dozens of hidden levels descending below, glossy bouncing ball at the top, electric green (#39FF14) safe platform segments, hot red (#FF0000) trap segments glowing as danger zones, cyan (#5CE1E6) gradient background, score multiplier HUD in top corner, level number badge top-left, bold white sans-serif on-screen text 'What's BELOW level 1?' centered upper third, x-ray scanline glow along the slice line, no characters, no people, clean mobile UI chrome matching Helix Jump screenshots.
